title: Creating Forms and Handling User Inputs

questions.sentence: Forms allow websites to collect information from users.
A simple form includes various 'input' elements.
Each input should have a 'label' so the user knows what to type.
When a user finishes, they click a 'submit' button.
Before sending the data to a server, developers often use 'Validation'.
Good forms also show 'error messages' to help the user fix mistakes.
